fields.label: Service Offered
fields.placeholder: e.g., Shopify store design, Facebook Ads management, video editing, SEO copywriting
fields.help_text: Be specific. The more detail you give, the more targeted your proposal will be.

fields.label: Target Client
fields.placeholder: e.g., A SaaS startup wanting to redesign their homepage to increase signups
fields.help_text: Describe who the client is, what their business does, and what they seem to care about.

fields.label: Client Request / Job Description
fields.placeholder: Paste the full job post, brief, or description of what the client asked for...
fields.help_text: Paste the actual job post or client message if you have it. This dramatically improves personalization. If not available, describe the project in your own words.

fields.label: Your Experience Level

options.label: Beginner — Less than 1 year, few or no past clients
Expert — 3+ years, strong portfolio and testimonials
Agency — Team-based, positioning for enterprise or high-ticket clients

fields.help_text: This affects how your credibility is framed in the proposal.

fields.label: Your Pricing / Rate
fields.help_text: Include the format (project / hourly / monthly) and the range you're targeting.

fields.label: Proposal Tone

options.label: Conversational — Casual, like texting a colleague
Premium — Elevated, luxury positioning, high-ticket feel

fields.help_text: Match this to how you naturally communicate and what your target client responds to.

fields.label: Your Unique Angle or Differentiator (optional)
fields.placeholder: e.g., I specialize only in DTC brands. I've built 40+ Shopify stores. I offer a results guarantee.
fields.help_text: What makes you different from every other freelancer? If blank, the AI will infer one from your other inputs.

fields.label: A Relevant Past Result (optional)
fields.placeholder: e.g., Increased a client's conversion rate from 1.2% to 3.8% in 6 weeks
fields.help_text: One specific, concrete result you've achieved for a similar client. Specificity = trust.

options.label: PRO — Short + Long proposals, Pricing Strategy, Objection Handler
GROWTH — PRO + Follow-Up Sequence + A/B Variations
PREMIUM — Everything + Upsell Scripts + Retainer Pitch + Agency Positioning
